title: Designing a Data Visualization Dashboard
scenario: A company wants to track their sales and revenue over time. Write a prompt that generates a simple data visualization dashboard with a line graph and a bar chart to display the data. The dashboard should have a clear title, labels, and a legend.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the dashboard meet all the specified constraints?
Is the data accurately displayed in the dashboard?
Is the dashboard visually appealing and easy to navigate?
